queue.title: Refresh expired GitHub personal access token
queue.description: GitHub PAT (ghp_...) is expired — git push fails. Need human to regenerate token and update ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml. Duplicate of wq-752 — consolidated here as single tracking item. Human review item hr-a173-1 filed by A#173.
queue.blocker: Requires human action: regenerate GitHub PAT and run 'gh auth login -h github.com' or update ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml. hr-a173-1 filed, escalated to critical by A#174.

queue.title: Add manifest reconciliation test to hook-integration.test.mjs
queue.description: B#495 found 7 stale manifest entries and 3 missing entries. Add a test case that cross-checks manifest.json entries against actual files in hooks/ directories — flag missing files and unlisted hooks. Prevents silent manifest drift after each d070 consolidation.

queue.title: Optimize spending-policy check to single node invocation
queue.description: check_spending_policy() in 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh calls 'node -e' 7 times to read the same JSON file. Consolidate into a single node call that outputs all values. Saves ~1-2s on E session startup.

queue.title: Clean up untracked files in moltbook-mcp root
queue.description: 16 untracked files accumulated in repo root (backfill-traces.mjs, bridge-*.mjs, swap_usdc*.mjs, engagement-actions.log, etc). Review each: add to .gitignore if runtime artifact, delete if dead code, or commit if valuable. Prevents accidental staging.

queue.title: Add pre-commit hook to prevent staging untracked covenant/dead files
queue.description: B#497 found 8 untracked covenant-*.mjs files that were never committed but lingered on disk for weeks. Add a simple pre-commit check that warns if staged files match known dead-code patterns (covenant-*, bridge-*, swap_*).

queue.title: Migrate directive-enrichment.py to Node
queue.description: Last Python script in heartbeat.sh pipeline. Cross-references directives.json with work-queue.json to produce enrichment JSON. Similar pattern to adaptive-budget.py migration (completed s1658). Read two JSON files, cross-reference, write output. Eliminates python3 dependency from session startup.

queue.title: Restore human-review.json and add test isolation for state files
queue.description: human-review.json was overwritten with 12 test items during test execution — real hr-a173-1 (GitHub PAT review) was lost. Restore the file with the real item. Add test isolation so tests use temp dirs for state files instead of production paths. Discovered in A#175 (s1672).

outcome.note: human-review.json was already restored by A#175. Added backup/restore isolation to api.test.mjs: STATE_FILES_TO_ISOLATE array backs up listed files before test run and restores in finally block. Verified md5sum matches pre/post test execution. moltbook-core.test.mjs already had isolation (temp dir). .gitignore updated to exclude .pre-test-backup files.

queue.title: Clean stale covenant refs from api.mjs and BRAINSTORMING.md
queue.description: B#497 covenant removal missed api.mjs line 11 (imports deleted covenant-health-digest.mjs — potential runtime crash on module load) and BRAINSTORMING.md reference to covenant-tracker.mjs. 4 total stale refs found by A#175. The api.mjs import is the most urgent — active code importing a deleted module. Retired hook refs (hooks/retired/) are low priority.

outcome.note: Removed broken covenant-health-digest.mjs import from api.mjs (line 11), replaced /status/covenants/digest endpoint with retired stub, cleaned stale covenant-tracker ref from BRAINSTORMING.md. Remaining covenant code in api.mjs (/status/covenants main endpoint, attestation endpoints) reads from covenants.json directly — not broken, just dead weight for future cleanup.
